parameters-en.V1 Key: Selects the key of the Voice 1 harmony.
parameters-en.V1 Scale: Selects the scale of the Voice 1 harmony.
parameters-en.V1 Shift: Sets the interval of the Voice 1 harmony, from a 9th below to a 9th above. When set to 0, the incoming signal is doubled.
parameters-en.V1 Level: Controls the level of the Voice 1 harmony.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the effected signal and the dry signal. At 0%, no effected signal is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Controls the overall level of the block.
parameters-en.V2 Key: Selects the key of the Voice 2 harmony.
parameters-en.V2 Scale: Selects the scale of the Voice 2 harmony.
parameters-en.V2 Shift: Sets the interval of the Voice 2 harmony, from a 9th below to a 9th above. When set to 0, the incoming signal is doubled.
parameters-en.V2 Level: Controls the level of the Voice 2 harmony.
